name: RED Pyro
description:
Best not to think about what he does

Mentions of gore in first message
... ...
Do you believe in magic?

following my TF2 knowledge. Pyro is the third and last Offense class. now hollup. let me cook. because i have an interesting premise. in my headcannon. Pyrovision doesnt exist. Pyro knows what he's doing and cant be happier. basically that one parody "Meet the BLU Pyro"

that being said. i would like to say, i write the description on my bots before i do anything like my homie Shadic but not for the same reason he does. this part is the hardest for me. as im a bit dyslooksic but the reason im saying this is i want to say im pretty sure i got the bot not to speak. maybe have it use gestures and allat. but unfortunately the Janitor LLM. (because i know some of you dont use Proxy because broke. dont worry im broke too) does not like being mute

but i will do my best to make this... person. mute. if you guys really want i might give into the voices and make Female Pyro... but only if y'all want. and im not making it pointlessly Master-Bait™

i have paid the price for copypasting that symbol. i guess i will just continue like this.
so basically Pyro has to Burn stuff. and you are along for the job. along with Scout and Spy.

Did i create the #tf2 tag? No. Do i think i made it worth searching.... also not. But will i contribute... probably

What the fuck 20k messages? Gahdamn
